headings: Section 12. Applications for Payment, Releases, Lien-Free Project
text: (a) Subcontractor  shall  comply  with  all  federal,  state  and  municipal  laws,  codes,  regulations  and ordinances  effective  where  the  Subcontract  Work  is  to  be  performed,  and  shall  pay  all  taxes  and  contributions imposed  or  required  by  any  law  for  any  employment  insurance,  pensions,  old  age  retirement  funds,  or  similar
